TITLE Creamy Tomato Beans and Greens

# Mince [1 item onion], [4 cloves garlic]
# Saute onion and garile; [salt], [pepper], and [1/2 tsp allepo]. Cook until softened.
# Add [1/3 cup tomato paste] and bloom. 
# Add [28 oz cannellini beans[, rinsed]], [1/2 cup sun-dried tomatoes] and [1 cup water], and simmer until beans are creamy and the mixture is moderately thick.
# Add [1 cup heavy cream], [1/3 cup [finely grated] Pecorino]; heat through; adjust seasoning.
# In a medium bowl, toss [4 cup baby arugula], [2 tsp [finely grated] lemon zest] and [4 tsp lemon juice], plus [1/3 cup [finely grated] Pecorino] and [2 tbl olive oil]; season with salt and pepper. 
# Pile the greens at the center of the beans. Serve with toasted [sourdough].
